Landing.headline: Stop chasing your clients for documents.
Landing.subhead: A simple, bilingual client portal built for small Canadian accounting and bookkeeping firms.
Landing.feature_1_body: Pick a template (T1, T2, bookkeeping), send a magic link. Your clients log in to nothing.
Landing.feature_2_body: We nudge your clients on your behalf, at the right time, in French or English.
Landing.feature_3_body: Catch when a client uploads the wrong slip before it costs you an hour of email back-and-forth.

Auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.reset_subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
Auth.name: Your name

errors.email_taken: An account already exists with this email.
errors.signup_failed: Couldn't create the account. Please try again.
errors.reset_sent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way.
errors.reset_failed: The link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.

Onboarding.step1_subtitle: A few details about your firm to personalize the client portal.
Onboarding.step2_subtitle: Timezone and default language for emails sent to your clients.
Onboarding.step3_subtitle: Optional. You can also do this later in settings.
Onboarding.step3_invites_pending: Invites will be sent once that feature ships (coming soon).

App.dashboard_empty: No active engagements yet. Add your first client to get started.
App.settings_subtitle: Update your firm profile and preferences.

Clients.title: Clients
Clients.count: {count, plural, =0 {No clients} one {# client} other {# clients}}
Clients.add_subtitle: Add a new client to your list.
Clients.import_subtitle: Paste a CSV or upload a file exported from your accounting software.
Clients.import_columns_hint: Accepted columns (headers): name (required), email, phone, type (individual/business), language (fr/en), external_ref, notes.
Clients.import_commit: Import {count, plural, one {# client} other {# clients}}
Clients.summary_in_progress: {count, plural, one {# in progress} other {# in progress}}
Clients.empty: No clients found. Try adjusting filters or add a new client.

Engagements.title: Engagements
Engagements.new_subtitle: Pick a client, a template, then tweak the document checklist.
Engagements.due_date_hint: If empty, reminders will fire based on time since send.
Engagements.checklist_empty: No items in the checklist. Pick a template or add one.
Engagements.draft_notice: This engagement is a draft. Click "Send" to generate the client's magic link.
Engagements.magic_link_hint: Email is sent automatically when the link is generated. Copy here if you want to share it via another channel.
Engagements.reject_subtitle: Tell {label} the client what's wrong. They'll see this message on their portal.
Engagements.reject_reason_placeholder: E.g. "This is your 2023 T4 — I need 2024."
Engagements.reject_suggestion_wrong_doc: Wrong document — I asked for a different slip.
Engagements.reject_suggestion_wrong_year: Wrong year — please send the most recent one.
Engagements.reject_suggestion_illegible: Hard to read — can you re-scan with better lighting?
Engagements.reject_suggestion_missing_pages: Missing pages — please resend the full document.
Engagements.add_item_subtitle: The client will see this on their portal the next time they refresh.

errors.missing_title: Title must be at least 2 characters.
errors.create_failed: Couldn't create the engagement. Please try again.
errors.add_failed: Couldn't add the item. Please try again.

Attention.needs_attention_hint: Engagements that are overdue, due soon, or have gone quiet.
Attention.ready_to_review_hint: All required items uploaded — ready for your approve / reject pass.
Attention.empty_review: Nothing waiting for review right now.

Attention.overdue_by: {days, plural, one {# day overdue} other {# days overdue}}
Attention.due_in: Due in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
Attention.stale_days: Quiet for {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
